edgeCases: Missing inventory: non-zero exit, guides to centinela analyze, no draft written
Malformed inventory: distinct error, not the analyze-guidance path
Canonical roadmap.json never clobbered: byte-equal after run; draft lands only at draft path
Refusing --out = canonical path: WriteDraft refuses, wrapped write error, no file created
Empty/doc-only inventory: empty non-nil Baseline, 0 gaps, no malformed draft
No-TODO no-goal: Baseline-only draft, no Gaps phase, summary hints --goal
Determinism: two runs on unchanged inventory produce byte-identical draft JSON
Baseline exempt from status/coverage/readiness via same predicate as Backlog; Backlog/Bootstrap regression unchanged
Empty role on a target: description renders module label
TodoTargets accessor: returns TODO-bearing targets in order, zero-able
Mkdir/rename write failure surfaced as error; temp file cleaned up
